exam_price_notes: Approx. R$120–R$180 (~$22–$33 USD) in Brazil; fee varies at international application centres

testing_centers.provider: INEP Authorised Application Centres in Brazil (universities and federal institutes)
Brazilian Consulates and Embassies worldwide (international application centres)

id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID with signature: passport, national identity card, or official RNE (Registro Nacional de Estrangeiros) for residents in Brazil.
exam_rules: Both parts (oral and written) are administered in person. The oral interaction is conducted individually with a trained examiner and is recorded. The written part uses authentic input materials (printed texts, infographics, video on screen). No dictionaries or electronic devices permitted.
renewal_options: The CELPE-Bras certificate has lifetime validity. No renewal is required.

prerequisites.description: None. Most Brazilian public universities require at minimum the Intermediário level for foreign student admission.

retake_policy.notes: Candidates may sit both sessions per year (April and October). No waiting period between attempts. Registration is required for each session.

domains.name: Oral Interaction (Parte Oral) — sustained discussion with examiner using complex authentic prompts
Written Production Task 1 — produce a well-structured text responding to a written input document
Written Production Task 2 — interpret and write about statistical or visual data
Written Production Task 3 — produce a text based on a video input at natural speech rate

official_study_resources.title: CELPE-Bras Sample Exams and Preparation Materials (Official)
